hero.sub: Fullstack developer with 7 years in production. I care about the details that are visible — and the ones that aren't.

items.title: Websites
items.desc: Landings, presentations, e-commerce, and custom marketing sites. I can estimate upfront with a fixed budget, or we work agile and adjust as we go.

items.title: Business apps
items.desc: Internal tools, dashboards, admin systems. Long-term collaboration, clear documentation.

items.title: Team extension
items.desc: Years of experience working in teams and as a solo developer. I can help out for a sprint, a project, or long-term — React, Next.js, TypeScript.

services.bigger_heading: Think I wouldn't be enough for your project alone?
services.bigger_body: Reach out anyway — we'll talk through what you need, and I can either put together a team or refer you to a reliable partner.

about.heading_after: so you know who you're talking to.
about.lead: Fullstack developer who takes craft seriously. I write code that holds — and that other people on the team enjoy working with.

facts.value: 7 years fulltime. Production projects from MVP to enterprise.
Proud dad and husband. Check out her dog leads — gowiththeflow.cz
Zlín · CZ · remote OK · occasionally Brno / Prague.

contact.step1_desc: Website, business app, or team extension? Send a few lines about the project — I'll reply within 24 hours.
contact.step2_desc: Online, no commitment. We'll talk scope, timeline, and price — and see if we're a good fit.
